name: mapr
explanation: MapR is the Hadoop distribution. The check consumes metrics from a MapR Streams (Kafka-API) topic at `<stream_path>/<stream_id>:<hostname>` using the MapR-flavoured `confluent_kafka` library. On secured clusters (the production default) the consumer must authenticate with a MapR ticket file passed via `ticket_location` or the `MAPR_TICKETFILE_LOCATION` environment variable; the check warns if neither is set. The ticket is a per-user credential issued by `maprlogin` on the cluster, not something discoverable over the wire. The integration also depends on the `mapr-streams-python` package and on `LD_LIBRARY_PATH` pointing at the MapR client libraries, which is host provisioning state. Pattern D / I.
notes: All spec fields are technically optional (defaults derive from env/FQDN) but the integration cannot run on a secured cluster without the user-provisioned ticket file. The ticket is the credential.
